sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n224" key="a)bwlo/kopos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀβωλόκοπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n224.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not hoed,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:246" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.246</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
